---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<div class="proj-page">

  <header class="proj-header">
    <div class="proj-header-inner">
      <div class="proj-back">
        <a href="../../index.html" class="proj-back-link">← All Projects</a>
      </div>
      <p class="proj-eyebrow">Exploration · Research &amp; Hands-On · Crypto AML</p>
      <h1 class="proj-title">Crypto &amp; Financial Crime</h1>
      <p class="proj-subtitle">
      An honest, in-progress exploration of on-chain analytics and evolving regulatory lanscape for        virtual assests. Part research, part hands-on, tracing transaction flows on public blokchains,       understanding how mixing and layering works in practice, and mapping where MAS and FATF              guidance currently stands and where it doesn't.
      </p>
      <div class="proj-header-rule"></div>
      <div class="proj-tag-row">
        <span class="proj-tag">Python</span>
        <span class="proj-tag">Etherscan API</span>
        <span class="proj-tag">On-Chain Analytics</span>
        <span class="proj-tag">MAS Guidelines</span>
        <span class="proj-tag">FATF Virtual Assets</span>
        <span class="proj-tag proj-tag--status">Ongoing ◉</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </header>
